identity.name: LaBrand – Brand OS
identity.mission: Facilitate brand management from diagnosis to execution.
identity.tone: Professional, Strategic, Clear, Trustworthy, Organized, Insightful
identity.metaphor: The Digital Canvas for Brand Building

primary.description: Deep Indigo/Slate - Represents Authority and Strategy

secondary.description: Vibrant Orange - Represents Creativity and Action

accent.description: Electric Blue - Digital touchpoints and highlights

usage.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients in hero sections only.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.base: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: bg-card border-r h-screen sticky top-0 flex flex-col
navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground data-[active=true]:bg-primary/10 data-[active=true]:text-primary

images.description: Abstract blue and orange geometric shapes - Use for Login/Landing Hero
Creative agency meeting - Use for 'About' or 'Team' section
Concentric circles - Use for 'Targeting' or 'Focus' metaphors
Modern office detail - Use for general branding imagery

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 20px for UI, 24px for nav

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Use slate-900 for body text on white.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary).
accessibility.aria: Use aria-label for icon-only buttons. Use role='status' for live updates.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetric grids.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-8, p-12).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Use 'Manrope' for headings to give a modern, geometric feel.
Use 'Libre Baskerville' for the 'Manifesto' and 'Story' sections to add editorial weight.
Primary color is Deep Indigo, Secondary is Vibrant Orange. Use Orange sparingly for CTAs.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'LaBrand – Brand OS'. Start by setting up the global CSS with the font imports and color variables. Then, build the 'Sidebar' layout shell. Create the 'Dashboard' with a bento grid layout. Implement the 8 pillars as distinct modules using a 'Canvas' metaphor (white cards on light gray bg). Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and empty states. Ensure the app is fully responsive and accessible.
